---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something to add or improve
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of what you want to add or change.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve, or what use case does it enable?

## Proposed API

If you have an idea of how it should look, show it here:

```php
// Example of how you'd expect to use it
$client->table('events')
    ->...
```

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you have thought about.

## Additional context

Links to ClickHouse docs, related issues, or any other relevant context.

---

> **Note:** Check the [ROADMAP](../../ROADMAP.md) before opening — your idea may already be planned.
> If it is, a +1 comment on the roadmap item is more useful than a new issue.
